sourceAttribution: Exercise taxonomy informed by ExRx.net. Instructions and comments are app-curated.

instructions: Lie on bench with feet flat.
Grip bar just outside shoulder width.
Lower to mid-chest; press to lockout.
comments: Use a spotter for heavy sets.

instructions: Brace core; sit hips back and down.
Drive hips forward to stand tall.

comments: Squeeze shoulder blades at the top.
Keep bar path close to face.

instructions: Hang from bar with arms extended.
Push hips back lowering bar along legs.

comments: Keep lower back in contact with pad.
Do not clang weights at top.

instructions: Sit with knees aligned to pivot.
Upper back on bench; bar over hips.
Drive hips up to full extension.
Hands under shoulders; body in plank.
Drive through front foot to next step.
Lower until upper arms are parallel.
Stand by extending hips and knees.

comments: Touch dumbbells lightly at top optional.
Fixed bar path reduces stabilizer demand.
Keep front knee tracking over foot.

instructions: Pull bar along body to chin height.
comments: Use grip width comfortable for shoulders.

instructions: Raise legs to parallel or higher.
Drive hips to swing to chest height.
